environments.description: Named environments, each with an optional proxy and default URL

configPath.description: Directory for browser profile dirs (e.g. .posh/browser); created on startup

proxy.description: Provider-level default proxy (fallback when env has no proxy set)

command.description: Browser binary path; defaults to Chrome on macOS, google-chrome on Linux

proxy.description: Named SSH proxy from the global proxies config

url.description: Default URL to open when no URL argument is given

incognito.description: Open in incognito mode (visual only; session is already isolated via temp profile dir)
